case_title: K. MIRANDA VS. NICOLE BINGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION (NO WRITTEN AGREEMENT). DAILY RENTAL IS $54.285. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRANDA, K. PROP, MGR. - FRANCES HOTEL
